title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.150 - Washrooms for women
text:
292.150.  Washrooms for women. — In every factory, workshop or other establishment in this state where girls or women are employed, where unclean work of any kind has to be performed, suitable places shall be provided for such girls or women to wash and dress.
(RSMo 1939 § 10190, A.L. 2007 S.B. 613 Revision) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13230; 1919 § 6794; 1909 § 7835
